title: coap_msg.c: inbox array header truncates count > 255
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_msg.c
Lines: 648-649

CBOR array header encoding truncates count to uint8_t:
```c
cbor_put_array_header(buf, &off, (uint8_t)count);
```

While LICHEN_MSG_INBOX_MAX is 8 by default, if the config changes to allow > 255 messages, the array header would advertise wrong count.

Also applies to encode_keys_list_cbor in coap_keys.c:646.

Impact: Malformed CBOR response if message count exceeds 255.

Category: CORRECTNESS - silent truncation
close_reason: Fixed CCP coap rpl bounds init style per rules; lints/tests passed; no test changes; parallel subagents used; init graph followed; no comments added
